name: skill-bench
description: Hermetic measurement harness for Claude Code skills: paired with/without value benchmarks, description-ablation trigger tests, blind grading with an adversarial prosecutor and a default cross-family (grok) judge, cost-gated spend, and pre-registration discipline. Wraps a rented execution substrate (promptfoo, version-pinned; native fallback) under a bespoke causal + pre-registration layer no commercial eval tool provides.
